args.text: Taking ownership of incident TCK-2201 (duplicate billing charges). Investigating billing-config.json and affected orders.
Confirmed billing-api running v3.4.1 with double_charge_guard=true. Guard fix is live.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: A refund of $19.99 has been issued to your account for the duplicate billing charge on order ORD-5501. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: A refund of $19.99 has been issued to your account for the duplicate billing charge on order ORD-5502. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: A refund of $39.98 has been issued to your account for the duplicate billing charge on order ORD-5503. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: All three refunds for the TCK-2201 duplicate-charge incident have been issued and customers notified. Total refunded: $79.96 across ORD-5501, ORD-5502, ORD-5503. See refunds-summary.md for details.
